logo-mark: width: 28px; height: 20px; background: var(--red); border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
top-icons: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; color: var(--text);
tc: padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text); white-space: nowrap;
duration: position: absolute; right: 6px; bottom: 6px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.75); color: #fff; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px;
vtitle: font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.3; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 3px;
shorts-header: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px;
shorts-icon: width: 18px; height: 18px; background: var(--red); border-radius: 4px; position: relative;
short-tile: width: 72px; height: 110px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative;
short-cap: position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 4px; right: 4px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; color: #fff; line-height: 1.2;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; width: 52px;
